nodes.label: .`generates FOCUS_SUBJECT when subject risk is HIGH`()
.`generates FOCUS_SUBJECT when subject risk is CRITICAL`()
.`does not generate WORKLOAD_REDUCTION when workload is not CRITICAL`()
.`does not generate BREAK_SUGGESTION when burnout is NONE`()
.`generates CONSISTENCY_IMPROVEMENT when any subject consistency below 0 dot 3`()
.`generates TIME_MANAGEMENT when 3 or more deadlines in same week`()
.`does not generate TIME_MANAGEMENT when less than 3 deadlines in same week`()
.`returns empty list when no risk or workload issues`()
